english: The Linga worshipped by Brahma, Vishnu and all the gods, the Linga shining with pure radiance
The Linga that destroys the sorrows born of birth — I bow to that Linga of Sadashiva
roman: Janmaja duhkha vinashaka lingam, tat pranamamis Sadashivalingam

english: The Linga worshipped by the foremost of gods and sages, that burned Kama, the merciful Linga
The Linga that destroyed the pride of Ravana — I bow to that Linga of Sadashiva
roman: Ravanadarpavinas ha nallingam, tat pranamamis Sadashivalingam

english: The Linga anointed with all fragrant substances, the Linga that enhances intellect
roman: Sarvasugandhisulipita lingam, buddhi vivardhana karana lingam

english: The Linga revered by Siddhas, gods and demons — I bow to that Linga of Sadashiva
roman: Siddhasura suravandita lingam, tat pranamamis Sadashivalingam

english: The Linga adorned with gold and great gems, the Linga beautified by the coiling serpent king
roman: Kanaka maha manibhushita lingam, phanipati veshtita shobhita lingam

english: The Linga that destroyed the sacrifice of Daksha — I bow to that Linga of Sadashiva
roman: Daksha suyagna vinashana lingam, tat pranamamis Sadashivalingam

english: This sacred Lingashtakam, whoever reads it in the presence of Shiva
roman: Lingashtakam idam punyam yah pathet shiva sannidhau

english: Attains the world of Shiva and rejoices together with Shiva
